known_gaps: Generated LED PCB pad and copper net codes now clear writer correctness, exposing the next blocker: local route endpoints are not yet physically connected to same-net pads.
Routing is intentionally skipped for the first KiCad-backed smoke fixture until connectivity/routing can be promoted to a passing optional example.
notes: Smallest optional design-create fixture for local real kicad-cli smoke runs; currently tracks the post-net-assignment connectivity and KiCad ERC/DRC blockers.
